name: consent_capture
description: Multi-consent capture and management. A 'Consents' chart-header button (always shown; red when the patient still has a required consent due, neutral gray once satisfied) opens a picker of all configured consents, and records the selected one via the Canvas FHIR API with a generated documentation PDF. Configure consents (verbiage, questions, capacity statements) at runtime on the Consent Settings page: sign in to Canvas and open /plugin-io/api/consent_capture/admin/settings.

protocols.description: 'Consents' action button in the patient chart header, always shown for a patient. It turns red only for an active, non-deceased patient with a required consent still due, and is a neutral gray otherwise; it opens the consent picker.
Endpoint that records the selected consent via the Canvas FHIR API, and serves the recorded consent's PDF for the completed cards.

Admin endpoints for the Consent Settings UI: lists the instance's Patient Consent Codings, stores the plugin workflow (verbiage, questions) configured for each, and runs the admin-only banner backfill across active patients.
Adds a red profile banner alert when the patient has a required consent that is not on file, and removes it once all required consents are complete.
